gap_summaries: [post-impl] FIXED POST-001: resolve_template_ref silently accepted bare '@' and '@version' refs with empty template_id — now raises SeedTemplateError; tests added
[post-impl] FIXED POST-002: validate_bundle did not check path traversal in src entries — added resolve()+relative_to() guard; test added
[post-impl] FIXED POST-003: validate_manifest did not reject src/dst values containing '..' or absolute paths — added path traversal checks; tests added
[production] FIXED PROD-001: instantiate_template crashed on UnicodeDecodeError/OSError during read/write — now catches and records in result.errors; test added for binary src
[production] FIXED PROD-003: resolve_variables accepted non-string variable values (int defaults from JSON) — now validates all values are strings; tests added
[production] FIXED PROD-004: both seed_template.py and seed_renderer.py lacked __all__ exports — added to match project convention
[production] FIXED PROD-002: partial instantiation state on crash — addressed by PROD-001 fix ensuring the loop always completes and returns its result
[production] deferred PROD-005: no type validation for template variables (e.g. health_port as non-numeric) — bundled templates have correct string defaults; deferred to post-keystone
[production] deferred PROD-006: validate_bundle does not detect orphan .tmpl files on disk missing from manifest — low-risk for bundled templates; deferred
